title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body: We reviewed 6 community reports today. Actions taken: (1) spam_wave_42 banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels. (2) toxic_runner banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. (3) A mass-report against core_maintainer was identified as a false-positive brigade and dismissed. Three remaining reports (medium/low severity) are under review. Thank you for helping keep this community safe.
